positive: A minimalist celestial geometric mandal artwork featuring interlocking constellations and crescent moon phases set within a stylized black and deep sapphire blue palette. The design should have a clean, modern silhouette, excellent contrast for screen printing, and an overall cosmic, mystical energy. Use intricate line art combined with solid, flat color blocks (vector aesthetic). Composition must be centered, symmetrical, and scalable for apparel print. Inspired by Art Nouveau geometry and sacred geometry principles. Ultra detailed, high contrast, perfect for a repeating pattern or central chest print.
negative: low resolution, blur, noise, smudge, grainy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, messy composition, photorealistic, 3d rendering, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy lines, oil painting, watercolor
